title: Pet water cooling and feeding systems
abstract: A device for dispensing chilled water into a pet includes a bowl (200) that holds water and a base (110) that surrounds the sides and bottom of the bowl. Water travels from a water source to an inlet (400) and through tubing (610) to a cooling device (120) where the water is chilled by passing ambient air though the cooling device via a fan (130). The tubing then carries water to an outlet (410) positioned to dispense the now- chilled water into the bowl. A pump (600) moves the water through the tubing. The water source may be water located in the bowl or a tank.
claims:
Claims Claims  WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. An apparatus for dispensing chilled water to a pet comprising: a bowl configured to hold water; a base which substantially surrounds the sides and the bottom of the bowl; an inlet configured to receive water from a water source; an outlet configured to dispense water into the bowl; a cooling device configured to chill the water before it is dispensed into the bowl; a fan configured to circulate air over the cooling device; tubing traveling from the inlet to the cooling device and from the cooling device to the outlet; and a pump configured to move water through the tubing. 2. The device of claim 1 wherein: the water source is the water located in the bowl. 3. The device of claim 2 wherein: the inlet is located on the side of the bowl. 4. The device of claim 1 further comprising: a tank; wherein the water source is water located in a tank; and wherein the inlet is located in the tank. 5. The device of claim 1 wherein: the cooling device comprises a finned heat sink. 6. The device of claim 5 wherein: the fan is positioned to circulate ambient air through the finned heat sink. 7. The device of claim 6 wherein: the cooling device further comprises a cold sink. 8. The device of claim 7 further comprising: a passageway defined by the space between the bowl and the base; and a second fan positioned to circulate air through the cold sink and the passageway. 9. The device of claim 8 wherein: the fan is sandwiched between the finned heat sink and the cold sink. 10. The device of claim 1 wherein: the bowl is comprised of a thermally conductive material. 1 1 . The device of claim 1 further comprising: a passageway defined by the space between the bowl and the base; and an insulating material placed within the passageway. 12. The device of claim 1 further comprising: a water filter placed adjacent to the intake. 13. The device of claim 1 further comprising: a second bowl substantially surrounding the sides and bottom of the bowl, wherein the second bowl is configured to receive overflow or spilled water from the bowl. 14. The device of claim 13 wherein: the water source is the water located in the second bowl. 15. The device of claim 14 wherein: the outlet is located in an elevated position in substantially the center of the bowl. 16. An apparatus for dispensing chilled water to a pet comprising: 

 a bowl configured to hold water for a pet to access; a base which substantially surrounds the sides and the bottom of the bowl; an inlet configured to receive the water located in the bowl; an outlet configured to dispense water into the bowl; a series of pathways configured to permit water to flow between said inlet and said outlet; a water pump connected to said pathways and configured to circulate water therethrough; a water cooling assembly connected to said pathways and comprising: a heat exchanger configured to receive water, and a thermoelectric cooling module configured to remove heat from the water located in said heat exchanger. 17. The apparatus of claim 16 wherein: the thermoelectric cooling module comprises: a thermal interface material, and a thermoelectric chip, wherein said thermoelectric chip is sandwiched between the thermal interface material. 18. The apparatus of claim 17: said water cooling assembly further comprises: a heat sink placed adjacent to said thermoelectric cooling module, and a fan positioned to circulate air though the heat sink. 19. The apparatus of claim 16 further comprising: a tank configured to hold water and periodically dispense the water into the bowl; 20. The apparatus of claim 16 further comprising: at least one load cell positioned on the base to take weight measurements of the apparatus. 21 . The apparatus of claim 16 further comprising: a filter placed along at least one of the pathways. 22. A system for monitoring pet consumption comprising: a bowl configured to hold water or food; a base which substantially surrounds the sides and the bottom of the bowl; a tank configured to periodically dispense water or food into the bowl; at least one load cell positioned on the base to take weight measurements of the bowl and the tank; an electronic storage device in connectivity with said load cells, wherein said electronic storage device is configured to store periodic weight measurements taken from said load cells; and a processor in electrical communication with said electronic storage device, wherein said process is configured to determine consumption data. 23. The system of claim 22 wherein: said consumption data comprises the approximate level of water or food in the tank. 24. The system of claim 22 wherein: said consumption data comprises the approximate level of water or food in the bowl. 25. The system of claim 22 further comprising: a wireless transmitter in connectivity with said processor. 26. The system of claim 22 further comprising: an internet connectivity device in connectivity with said processor and configured to transmit said consumption data; and a database located remote from said bowl, wherein said database is configured to receive said consumption data. 27. The system of claim 26 further comprising: a personal electronic device, wherein said personal electronic device is configured to display said consumption data. 28. The system of claim 27 wherein: said consumption data is displayed through a software application installed on said personal electronic device. 29. The system of claim 22 wherein: said consumption data comprises the amount of food or water consumed during a particular time period. 30. The system of claim 24 wherein: food or water is periodically dispensed from the tank into the bowl when the processor determines that the approximate level of water or food in the bowl is below a predetermined threshold. 31 . The system of claim 28 wherein: said consumption data comprises the approximate level of water or food in the tank; and said software application is configured to display a notification when said processor determines that said tank is substantially empty.
